memory.summary: The strong odor and unwashed clothes are severely disrupting my focus, but moving to the library is a viable solution. My low energy and sleep debt make immediate relocation necessary.
Roommate R apologized and will handle the issue immediately. This confirms the odor problem is resolvable without further escalation.
Library relocation protects focus but won't fix sleep debt if the odor issue remains unresolved.
Roommate R apologized and will fix the odor immediately, removing the need for further escalation or relocation.
Progress on the reading response improved, but with only 2 hours of sleep and high stress, I must prioritize rest before continuing work.
The odor is resolved, yet my low energy and sleep debt prevent further work on the reading response.
Work progress increased slightly to 0.79, but high stress and low energy persist despite the resolved odor issue.
Reading response progress increased to 0.83, yet my energy and sleep debt remain critically low despite the odor resolution.
I made significant progress on the reading response, raising it from 0.83 to 0.88, though my low energy and sleep debt remain unchanged.
Reading response progress improved to 0.94, but high stress and severe sleep debt persist despite recent work efforts.
The reading response is complete, but my critically low energy and high stress remain unchanged despite this achievement.
The reading response is fully complete, yet my energy is depleted at 0.0 and stress remains high despite this achievement.
